description: Style NoteA perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Zoom Hi makes for a great casual shoe, with its low profile silhouette and modern design updates.Product DetailsBlunt toed synthetic upper with central lace-ups and a Velcro strap above the tonguePadded mesh inner with branding at the tongue and heelThick TPU outsole with branded grooves, upraised at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
